## Process
### Functions
- `_tenant(r)`: (no docstring)
- `health()`: (no docstring)
- `touchpoints(request, limit)`: Raw touchpoint feed (recent runs · campaign join).
- `compute(request, model, value_per_outcome)`: Run one of the 5 attribution models.
- `compare(request)`: Run all 5 models · returns per-campaign per-model matrix for diff.
